name: Early Adopter
description: Joined during the early beta phase of Moow AI.

name: Staff
description: Verified developer and core team member of Moow AI.

name: Verified Creator
description: Recognized for high interaction bots or exceptional high-quality content.
condition: Min 10K chats per character and total 50K minimum.

name: Supporter
description: Generously supported the platform through donations.

name: Wiki Contributor
description: Helped build platform documentation and guided users on creation.

name: Top Contributor
description: Consistently active and helpful in comments, Discord, and communities.
condition: Active community member recognized by staff.
